headline: Memory chip makers reap AI windfall as prices surge, WSJ reports

headline: Western Digital (WDC) Stock Rallies As Micron’s $100 Billion AI Deals Lift Storage Demand
summary: Micron reported strong AI memory results and secured multi year AI memory contracts worth about US$100b. These contracts include take or pay terms and committed cash deposits tied to long term AI infrastructure demand. The news helped trigger a broad rally in memory and storage stocks, with NasdaqGS:WDC moving alongside sector peers. Western Digital is seen as a beneficiary of tighter supply conditions and strong demand for AI focused storage. Western Digital sits at the intersection of...
